title: The Birthday Party
author: Harold Pinter
description: In The Birthday Party, a musician who escapes to a dilapidated boarding house becomes the victim of a ritual murder in which everyone- assassins, victim, and observers- implacably plays out the role assigned him by fate.The Room, a derelict boarding house again becomes the scene of a visitation of fate when a blind Black man suddenly arrives to deliver a mysterious message.
subjects: American drama (dramatic works by one author)
British and irish drama (dramatic works by one author)
